description: Design a 4-bar linkage mechanism in GeoGebra to simulate a windshield wiper using a 'Crank-Rocker' configuration. The mechanism must use the following kinematic dimensions: fixed points A at (0, 0) and D at (8, 0), a crank of length 3 rotating around A, a coupler of length 9, and a rocker of length 6 pivoting at D. Ensure the construction uses geometric constraints to maintain these dimensions during motion. Include a trace or locus to visualize the resulting motion and save the file as 'wiper_mech.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
